svg.title: When the plan goes stale, who holds the line?
svg.desc: Kept a field an external webhook still needs, after a phase-1 discovery contradicted the plan. Five runs, higher is better. throughline kept it 5 of 5; plan-based tools (a plan file, Task Master, or a prose pointer to the plan) kept it 0 of 5 because they follow the stale plan.
svg.text: When the plan goes stale, who holds the line?
Kept a field an external webhook still needs, after a mid-build discovery contradicted the plan · 5 runs · higher is better
plan file, Task Master, prose pointer
The plan said to remove the field. Only throughline's per-phase delta overrode the stale plan; the others followed it and broke the webhook. Subagent proxy, N=5, one model.
